title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・到達

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond wins spectacularly. However,
she says she'd like to race Mejiro McQueen in a
long-distance race next time—Mejiro McQueen's
specialty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen suggests that the four of them,
Tokai Teio and Kitasan Black included, all run in
the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Satono Diamond asks Mejiro
McQueen what she thinks her role is as an
illustrious runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen answers that it is to defeat
strong opponents and prove the prestige of the
Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon hearing this, Satono Diamond ponders what
being an illustrious runner means to her.
